subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! His honour Ali-Reza Khan, upon him be the Glory of the All-Glorious, is present and requesteth a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله جناب علیرضا خان علیه بهاء الله الابهی حاضر و خواهش تحریری
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement
